message:
fix: enable multi-architecture Docker builds for refresh-container compatibility

The refresh-container command was failing on amd64 systems because GitHub
Actions workflows were only building for arm64 or single architecture.
This adds linux/amd64,linux/arm64 platform support to both CI and PR
workflows to ensure the packnplay-default image works on all architectures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,5 +61,6 @@ jobs:
           context: .devcontainer
           push: false
           tags: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
+          platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

@@ -51,7 +51,7 @@ jobs:
           labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
-          platforms: linux/amd64
+          platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
 
       - name: Test image functionality
         run: |
